themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "The phrase 'let us bring again the ark of our God to us' reveals a crucial theological insigh...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".

3: and let us bring back the ark of our God...
13: So David did not bring the ark with him to the City of David

themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּירָ֤א: was afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
